spec.name: The Laboratory
spec.description: Some small cages sit here, containing many different types of rodents. Leaning down to look better, you are very surprised as a tiny, common garden mouse growls at you and tries to rip your face off through the bars. There are some bulges on its back, and it doesn't seem to be in a very good mood. It quivers some, not fully in control of its motor functions. Poor thing.
